text.title: Design Tokens Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces this contract before the artefact is accepted.

example.note: spec_id too short, version not semver, primitives_count below minimum, platforms empty, missing semantics_count + components_count.

forbidden.pattern: Hex value hardcoded in component code (must reference a semantic token)
Component-tier token referencing a primitive directly (must go through a semantic)
Platform-specific token file hand-edited (must be regenerated from JSON source)
Token spec without platforms array (must declare emission targets)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Sort token keys alphabetically per tier for diff hygiene.
Normalize colour values to lowercase hex / canonical rgb().
